rationale: A0 shows svchost.exe (PID 520, SYSTEM) initiating a TCP connection from loopback IPv6 (::1) to ::1:5985 (WinRM), and EV-001 shows the System process (PID 4) accepting that same connection on the loopback interface — a classic loopback pair confirming purely local WinRM activity. Port 5985 over localhost is consistent with legitimate local WinRM/PowerShell remoting or management tooling (e.g., scheduled tasks, SCCM, or Windows Admin Center communicating locally). Both endpoints are ::1 with no external network exposure, the initiating image is a signed Windows system binary, and no suspicious child processes, command-line activity, or lateral movement indicators are present in the package.
